name: Sleepy
description: SHOWER GUMMY: When twilight settles in, wash the day away with sweet and comforting malty lavender suds.
archive_note: The Sleepy scent family launched as a body lotion and expanded into a full range of products; shower gummy formats are a newer Kitchen innovation
nostalgia_angle: The Sleepy range took the Lush world by storm and became a cult phenomenon, with fans swearing by its sleep-inducing lavender and tonka scent — this shower gummy brings that magic into the bathroom routine
throwback_reference: A shower gummy interpretation of the iconic Sleepy body lotion, carrying the same malty lavender and tonka bean scent
